channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Beehiiv rolls out new creator tools, including webinars and customizable paywalls
item.description: Beehiiv is clearly done being just a newsletter platform based on today's launch of a new webinar feature, customizable paywalls, and more.

item.title: The Best Robotic Pool Cleaners of 2026: Beatbot, iGarden, Dreame
item.description: Send the pool guy packing. One of these robotic buddies can maintain your water quality instead.

item.title: Best Robot Vacuum of 2026: Shark, Eufy
item.description: Tired of vacuuming? Hand the reins to a robot vacuum.

item.title: Meta will now allow parents to see the topics their child discussed with Meta AI
item.description: Topics can range from "School," "Entertainment," and "Lifestyle" to "Travel," "Writing," and "Health and Wellbeing," among others, Meta says.

item.title: Lume Cube Edge Light Go Review (2026): Versatile, Portable
item.description: Portable lamps are rarely, if ever, as powerful, precise, and multipurpose as the Lume Cube Edge Light Go.

item.title: WhatsApp adds prepaid phone recharges in India as its payments usage still lags
item.description: WhatsApp is rolling out prepaid phone recharges to its 500 million users in India via PayU.

item.title: Surveillance vendors caught abusing access to telcos to track people’s phone locations, researchers say
item.description: The Citizen Lab found two separate surveillance vendors abusing the backbone of cellular networks to spy on several victims across the world.

item.title: AI galaxy hunters are adding to the global GPU crunch
item.description: Astronomers are turning to GPUs to find needles in the galactic haystack.

item.title: These New Smart Glasses From Ex-OnePlus Engineers Have a Hidden Cost
item.description: The Kickstarter-funded glasses from L'Atitude 52°N have AI features bundled for 1 year, but the company doesn't know yet how much it will charge for a...

item.title: Best Fitbit Models for Beginners, Athletes, and Kids (2026)
item.description: The fitness trackers I'd recommend to beginners, athletes, and kids.
